sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74612" key="o(posa/gwnon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁποσάγωνον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n74612.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">polygon of any number of sides,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:314:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">314.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
